channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jeanty falls short of record as dream season gets stuffed by Penn State defense in CFP loss
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Ashton Jeanty took the handoff on Boise State's first play and made it just a few steps before being greeted by a wall of dark blue Penn State jerseys that swallowed him up and shoved him backward for no gain.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: US beats Canada 4-1 to finish first in its group at world junior championship
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Danny Nelson scored the eventual game-winner in the third period and Trey Augustine made 38 saves, leading the United States to a 4-1 win over Canada on Tuesday night and into the top spot in Group A at the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Arizona State extends coach Kenny Dillingham 5 more years, AP source says
item.description: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham has agreed to a five-year contract extension on the eve of the Sun Devils' College Football Playoff quarterfinal game, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — St. Louis coach Jim Montgomery walked around before Tuesday night's Winter Classic. He looked at the growing crowd soaking in the festive atmosphere. He thought about all the famous ballplayers who played at Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Women's rights activists call for England to forfeit championship cricket match to Afghanistan
item.description: Women's rights activists have called for England's cricket team to forfeit its championship match against Afghanistan in February.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South Carolina's Shane Beamer separated from opposing coach in Citrus Bowl following taunt after injury
item.description: Shane Beamer needed to be separated from Bret Bielema on Tuesday after Bielema taunted Beamer following a player's injury in the Citrus Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah's road winning streak ends in Seattle
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) - Jaden Schwartz had a goal and two assists for the Seattle Kraken, who pulled away in the third period for a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Climate Pledge Arena on Monday. The loss ends Utah's seven-game road winning streak. “[Points] never come easy,” Schwartz said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matthew Gaudreau's wife announces the birth of their first child months after tragic death
item.description: Four months after her husband Matthew Gaudreau and his brother Johnny Gaudreau were killed by an alleged drunk driver, Madeline Gaudreau announced the birth of their first child.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Westbrook has 'perfect' triple-double, 0 turnovers in Nuggets' 132-121 win over Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW COLES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee remains No. 1 following quiet week in AP Top 25, No. 15 UCLA climbs 7 spots
item.description: Tennessee remains No. 1 after a quiet holiday week in the AP Top 25. The Volunteers received 41 first-place votes from a 61-person media panel in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released Monday. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Cathedral Catholic goalie shows why she's a keeper; honors her coach through art
item.description: Cathedral Catholic's 4-year starting goalie Maria'O Brien expresses her love to her head soccer coach through art. Suprising and touching longtime Cathedral Coach Dawn Lee.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5
